verses.text: This second letter stirs your 'pure minds' to remember the words of the prophets and apostles. Remember. Stir up memory of the holy word.
This second letter stirs your 'pure minds' to remember the words of the prophets and apostles. Remember. Stir up memory of the holy word.
In the last days scoffers will come, saying, 'Where is the promise of his coming?' All things continue as before. Mockers. They deny His return because it tarries.
In the last days scoffers will come, saying, 'Where is the promise of his coming?' All things continue as before. Mockers. They deny His return because it tarries.

They forget that by God's word the old world perished by water; the present heavens and earth are 'reserved unto fire' against judgment. Stored for fire. The same word that flooded keeps the world for judgment.

They forget that by God's word the old world perished by water; the present heavens and earth are 'reserved unto fire' against judgment. Stored for fire. The same word that flooded keeps the world for judgment.

They forget that by God's word the old world perished by water; the present heavens and earth are 'reserved unto fire' against judgment. Stored for fire. The same word that flooded keeps the world for judgment.
'One day is with the Lord as a thousand years'; He is not slack, but 'longsuffering,' not willing any should perish. Patient God. His delay is mercy, giving room to repent.
'One day is with the Lord as a thousand years'; He is not slack, but 'longsuffering,' not willing any should perish. Patient God. His delay is mercy, giving room to repent.
'The day of the Lord will come as a thief in the night,' when the heavens pass away and the elements melt. Sudden day. The end will come unlooked-for and complete.
Since all shall dissolve, what manner of persons ought you to be 'in all holy conversation,' looking for 'new heavens and a new earth'? Holy waiting. Coming judgment calls for holy living.
Since all shall dissolve, what manner of persons ought you to be 'in all holy conversation,' looking for 'new heavens and a new earth'? Holy waiting. Coming judgment calls for holy living.
Since all shall dissolve, what manner of persons ought you to be 'in all holy conversation,' looking for 'new heavens and a new earth'? Holy waiting. Coming judgment calls for holy living.
Be diligent to be found 'in peace, without spot'; count the Lord's longsuffering salvation, as Paul also wrote, though some wrest his words. Be ready. Live blameless while grace waits.
Be diligent to be found 'in peace, without spot'; count the Lord's longsuffering salvation, as Paul also wrote, though some wrest his words. Be ready. Live blameless while grace waits.
Be diligent to be found 'in peace, without spot'; count the Lord's longsuffering salvation, as Paul also wrote, though some wrest his words. Be ready. Live blameless while grace waits.
Beware lest you fall from steadfastness; 'grow in grace, and in the knowledge of our Lord and Saviour Jesus Christ.' Grow on. Guard your footing and keep growing in Christ.
Beware lest you fall from steadfastness; 'grow in grace, and in the knowledge of our Lord and Saviour Jesus Christ.' Grow on. Guard your footing and keep growing in Christ.
